   "reasoning": "Given the state cut, we need to get creative. Funding boost and incentives will buy us some goodwill and help retain staff. I'm not betting on scholarships to fix our dropout issues overnight, but some support is better than none. Transparency and reallocation are cheap and necessary. Hiring new staff is a long shot with limited funds, and counseling programs are good optics, but let's not get our hopes up.",
